title: Clockworker
description: This pack brings together the correct versions of all the mods required to play Clockwork and Interactive
body:
This is a basic modpack including all dependencies of clockwork for its available version

 

Valkyrien Skies changes a lot from version to version, and a lot of users are having trouble to combine the right ones when they want to use it. This pack will give the user no hassle with incompatible version and ease the road to gaming.

 

The pack includes:

Create

Clockwork

Interactive

 

Forge have Rubidium and Oculus

 

Fabric have Sodium 0.4.x and Iris

 

When Clockwork updates to newer versions so will this pack
